updateNote: Day 80 (12:07 PM PDT May 18): Israeli Navy intercepts 50+ boat Global Sumud Flotilla off Cyprus (16-17 vessels boarded) — Turkey calls it 'piracy.' Lebanon death toll reaches 3,020. Iran formally launches PGSA (Persian Gulf Strait Authority) X account — institutionalizing Hormuz $2M/transit toll system in yuan. Pezeshkian declares 'We will never bow' — calls conflict Iran's 'Third Imposed War.' Iran submits revised peace proposal via Pakistan — enrichment duration (5 vs 20 years) remains sticking point. IDF strikes southern Lebanon: 5 killed including 3 paramedics. Hamas appoints Mohammed Odeh as new Gaza leader. Brent $107.71 (–1.42%), WTI $103.52 (–1.80%) EOD — volatile session peaked at $112 on false Iran sanctions waiver report. Gas $4.513/gal. Blockade Day 77.
dataFreshnessWarning: Last updated 12:07 PM PDT on May 18, 2026 (Day 80)
